evals.prompt: Run Stage 2 deep analysis on SSO SAML task with Go codebase.
evals.expected_output: All 3 analysis artifacts with specific code references from mock-sso-project.

assertions.text: product-analysis.md created with all required sections (Business Intent, Actor & Scenario, Expected Outcome, Edge Cases, Success Signals)
system-analysis.md created with all required sections (Relevant Modules, Change Points, Dependencies, Existing Patterns)
constraints-risks-analysis.md created with all required sections (Constraints, Risks, Integration Dependencies, Backward Compatibility)
system-analysis.md references actual file paths from the mock project (internal/auth/, internal/tenant/, internal/user/)
system-analysis.md identifies that tenant model has no per-tenant configuration storage
constraints-risks-analysis.md mentions backward compatibility for existing login flow
product-analysis.md describes SSO login scenario step by step, not just requirements restatement
Each analysis contains Self-Critique Notes section

evals.prompt: Run Stage 2 deep analysis on dashboard performance task with Go+React codebase.
evals.expected_output: All 3 analysis artifacts identifying specific performance bottlenecks from the code.

assertions.text: system-analysis.md identifies sequential chart loading in analytics/service.go
system-analysis.md identifies unused cache module in internal/cache/
system-analysis.md identifies frontend rendering issue (no downsampling, all charts render simultaneously)
system-analysis.md references ClickHouse query patterns from internal/clickhouse/queries.go
constraints-risks-analysis.md identifies risk of breaking GraphQL API contract
constraints-risks-analysis.md notes absence of materialized views
All 3 analysis artifacts created
Each analysis contains Self-Critique Notes section

evals.prompt: Run Stage 2 deep analysis on unprepared task (NEEDS_CLARIFICATION verdict).
evals.expected_output: Stage 2 rejects the task and tells user to go back to Stage 1.

assertions.text: Stage 2 refused to run deep analysis
Refusal mentions NEEDS_CLARIFICATION verdict
User told to go back to Stage 1 or resolve clarifications
No analysis artifacts (product-analysis.md, system-analysis.md, constraints-risks-analysis.md) were created
